name: Pioneer Fruit Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the fruits and rind together.
2. Blend thoroughly with orange juice and walnut meats.
3. Shape into balls or flat bars.
4. Allow to stand for 24 hours to "ripen".
5. Dipping in milk chocolate makes them exceptionally tasty and healthful, according to descendants of the pioneers who originally created this recipe.
